Finnish Saunas in Whistler

Alpine-grade builds for Canada's mountain resort town.

Sauna Culture Meets Mountain Living

Whistler has a natural affinity for sauna. Cold plunges after skiing, evening sessions with mountain views, recovery after a day on the trails. It's not a luxury here -- it's part of how people live.

We build saunas for Whistler properties that handle the full alpine range: heavy snowfall, sub-zero nights, and the kind of UV exposure you get at elevation. Western Red Cedar, proper insulation, and ventilation designed for the conditions.

For resorts, lodges, and commercial operators, our SC model is purpose-built for high-traffic use. We handle everything from site assessment to installation.

Built for the Mountains

Alpine Construction

Heavy snow loads, extreme cold, intense UV. Our builds are engineered for Whistler's mountain conditions year-round.

Resort & Commercial Builds

Our SC commercial model handles high-traffic use. Built for lodges, hotels, and wellness operators who need durability.

30 Minutes from Our Workshop

Squamish to Whistler is a short drive. We handle delivery and installation ourselves -- no third-party logistics.

Whistler Installations

We're based in Squamish, 30 minutes down the highway. We build in our workshop and deliver direct.

The resort market has its own requirements -- guest-proof construction, commercial-grade heaters, and finishes that can take daily use. If you're a property owner or operator in the area, reach out for a quote and we'll come assess your site.

Ready to Build Your Sauna in Whistler?

Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your space and we'll design something built to last.

Get a Quote View Our Saunas

Harvia M3 or Homecraft 7.5kW

Standard Features Included

  • Knotty Western Red Cedar interior
  • One large window
  • One exterior accent wall
  • Metal exterior cladding
  • Full insulation package
  • Your choice of bench configuration
